title: Keep edge functions within runtime limits
description: Design edge functions for tight CPU/memory budgets and no persistent filesystem, unlike origin servers.
body: Use when moving logic to Cloudflare Workers or Lambda@Edge. Do not port origin code assuming a full Node runtime — edge runtimes cap CPU-ms and memory, lack a writable filesystem, and limit bundle size. Actions: measure CPU-ms and memory of the function, remove filesystem/long-lived-connection assumptions, and keep dependencies small. Validation signals include the function staying under the platform's CPU/memory cap and cold-start within budget. Risk boundary: an edge function that exceeds limits is killed mid-request, dropping traffic globally — escalate before shipping unbounded work to the edge.
